tasks.subject: Task 1: Implement SimpleViewPage component and template
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the stub SimpleViewPage with a working component that reads `:id` from the route, fetches the entity, and renders its fields vertically.

**Files:**
- Modify: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/pages/simple-view/simple-view-page.ts`
- Modify: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/pages/simple-view/simple-view-page.html`
- Create: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/pages/simple-view/simple-view-page.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `cd maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui && npx ng test --include='**/simple-view-page.spec.ts' --watch=false`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/pages/simple-view/simple-view-page.ts", "maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/pages/simple-view/simple-view-page.html", "maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/app/pages/simple-view/simple-view-page.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui && npx ng test --include='**/simple-view-page.spec.ts' --watch=false", "acceptanceCriteria": ["component compiles", "template renders field labels and values", "all 3 tests pass"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
